title: Clocking within DPI-C exported task.
body:
Hello sir.

while developing IP test environment for my team, some features look unsupported yet. So I wonder I could request you to support this.


My code is below,

```
[System verilog]
export "DPI-C" task verilog_clocking;
task run_clocking;
	@ (posedge `TB_MAINCLOCK);
endtask

task verilog_clocking;
	run_clocking;
endtask // verilog_clocking
```

I wanted to export this task as C function binding DPI-C and use it to make simulation time elapsed.
But Compiler put the compilation log with Error ::unsupported

```
%Error-UNSUPPORTED: /home/steven/Project/shared/soc_dv/testbench/lib/sv/dpi_lib.svh:16:2: Unsupported: Timing controls inside DPI-exported tasks
   16 |  @ (posedge clk);
      |  ^
```
                  
As you know, this code works well in VCS or incisiv (I wish i could use those tools, but I can't  for now)
Could you consider this issue?
Thank you.
StevenKim (SoC developer, Harman connected services inc.)
